title: Dialer Optimisations Specialist
location: Cape Town, WC, ZA
description:
**Dialler Optimisations Specialist**

  

* Fully office\-based, Pinelands (Cape Town)
* May be required to work shifts and/or weekends based on operational requirements.


Are you someone who gets a buzz from digging into data, spotting opportunities, and making things run better than before? If you thrive in fast\-moving environments and love being the person who figures out how to optimise the way things work, this one's for you.


This is an exciting opportunity to join a newly formed team inside South Africa's largest firm of its kind. You won't walk into an established setup with everything figured out you'll help shape how this function looks and operates. Real ownership, real impact, and the chance to leave your mark early.


The Dialler Optimisations Specialist sits at the intelligence layer of our Dialler Team, identifying opportunities before they're missed, investigating root causes, and driving meaningful improvements.


This isn't a data analyst role. It's a performance\-focused, hands\-on position for someone energetic, curious, and passionate about continuous improvement. If challenges excite you and you bring energy to everything you do, we'd love to hear from you.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Performance \& Monitoring**

* Monitor key Dialer metrics (idle time, contact rates, abandon rates, RPC ratios) and ensure these remain within agreed standards.
* Conduct deep\-dive investigations into underperforming campaigns and identify root causes.
* Work closely with the Dialer Administrator to ensure performance issues are resolved promptly and effectively.

**Troubleshooting \& Issue Oversight**

* Serve as the primary intelligence resource for diagnosing Dialer performance problems and briefing the Dialer Administrator on required fixes.
* Oversee the troubleshooting process end\-to\-end, ensuring issues are logged, prioritised, and resolved within agreed timeframes.
* Conduct post\-resolution reviews to confirm performance has returned to standard.

**Lead Insert \& Closing Logic (SQL)**

* Own and maintain automated lead insert and closing rules, including stored procedures and Dialer logic.
* Write, review, and update SQL queries to support campaign configuration and lead prioritisation.
* Translate business requirements into logical rule changes within the Dialer and database environment.
* Ensure all SQL changes are tested and documented before implementation.

**Stakeholder Engagement**

* Communicate proactively with stakeholders regarding underperforming campaigns and areas of concern.
* Develop improvement plans with clear timelines and expected outcomes, and track progress.
* Produce insights and recommendations from performance reports to support operational decision\-making.

**Compliance**

* Ensure all Dialer operations and automated processes comply with DMA and POPIA requirements.
* Maintain documentation of logic changes and performance interventions for audit purposes.

 **Key Requirements \& Qualifications**

* 2–4 years’ experience in a Dialer management or performance environment would be advantageous.
* An IT diploma or SQL certification will be advantageous.
* Experience with the Genesys Dialer will be advantageous.
* Contact centre outbound experience is advantageous.

 **Key Competencies**

* Strong analytical and investigative thinking.
* Results\-driven with a focus on performance improvement.
* Clear verbal and written communication, including presenting findings to non\-technical stakeholders.
* Proactive and self\-directed, able to manage multiple priorities.
* High attention to detail and commitment to accuracy.
* Collaborative, with the ability to work effectively across teams and levels.
* Honest, accountable, and aligned with IDM Group values.

 **Work Arrangement**

* Fully office\-based.
* May be required to work shifts and/or weekends based on operational requirements.

Key Responsibilities

Software Development

title: Senior Manager, Finance – FP&A and Project Finance
location: Cape Town, WC, ZA
description:
**Job Title:**Senior Manager, Finance – FP\&A and Project Finance (Exceptional candidates who do not fully meet the Senior Manager criteria may be considered for a Manager\-level position.)


**Reports to****:** Global Finance Director (Washington, DC)


**Direct Reports:**Financial Reporting Analyst (Delhi, India)


**Location:** Cape Town, South Africa


**Senior Manager Salary Range:** R1,500,000 \- R1,700,000


**Updated:** June 2026

  


**About CPI**



Climate Policy Initiative (CPI) is an analysis and advisory organization with deep expertise in finance and policy. Our mission is to help governments, businesses, and financial institutions drive economic growth while addressing climate change. Our vision is to build a sustainable, resilient, and inclusive global economy.

  



CPI operates globally, with offices in Austria, Brazil, India, Indonesia, South Africa, the United Kingdom, and the United States. We are widely recognized for tracking sustainable investment trends, identifying innovative financial and policy solutions, and supporting stakeholders to accelerate the transition to a low\-carbon, climate\-resilient economy. CPI’s work is distinguished by its strong focus on finance, analytical rigor, and ability to convene decision\-makers across the public and private sectors.

  


**About the role**



The Senior Manager, Finance provides senior FP\&A leadership and project finance oversight across CPI, with responsibility for forecasting, financial performance analysis, and portfolio\-level planning. Reporting to the Global Finance Director, this role partners closely with project delivery teams to ensure financial insight, reforecasting, and resource planning support high\-quality delivery and informed decision\-making.

  


**Key responsibilities**


**FP\&A, Forecasting \& Financial Planning**


* Lead the preparation and consolidation of organization\-wide forecasts and financial plans, supporting annual budgeting and rolling forecast cycles.
* Own and maintain financial models and tools used for forecasting, scenario analysis, and performance tracking.
* Analyze financial performance against budget and forecast, identifying drivers, trends, and risks, and communicating insights clearly to leadership.
* Support senior finance leadership with forward\-looking analysis to inform planning and prioritization.

  


**Project Finance \& Portfolio Oversight**


* Oversee financial performance across a portfolio of projects, providing guidance to project and program teams on budgeting, forecasting, and financial management.
* Support project leaders with reforecasting, staffing assumptions, and cost management to address emerging delivery risks.
* Ensure financial planning and analysis appropriately reflect donor and contract constraints, coordinating closely with Grants \& Contracts finance.
* Maintain portfolio\-level visibility of burn rates, cost recovery, and financial risks.

  


**Financial Reporting, Controls \& Quality Assurance**


* Ensure high standards of accuracy, consistency, and timeliness in FP\&A and project finance reporting outputs.
* Review and quality\-assure financial analyses and reports produced by the finance team.
* Support audit readiness and documentation for FP\&A\-related processes, in coordination with Grants \& Contracts and accounting teams.

  


**Systems, Tools \& Continuous Improvement**


* Lead improvements to budgeting, forecasting, and reporting tools to enhance efficiency, consistency, and usability.
* Drive standardization of financial assumptions, templates, and guidance across projects and teams.
* Identify and implement process improvements that strengthen financial planning and performance management.

  


**Team Leadership \& Cross\-Organizational Collaboration**


* Directly manage the Financial Reporting Analyst, providing clear priorities, coaching, and performance feedback.
* Support development of analytical capability and ownership within the finance team.
* Collaborate effectively with program, operations, and finance colleagues across regions.
* Act as a senior finance partner to project teams, reinforcing CPI values of rigor, collaboration, and accountability.

  


**Qualifications and Experience**


* Minimum 3–5 years progressive experience in FP\&A, project finance, or financial management.
* Demonstrated experience overseeing multiple projects or a financial portfolio.
* Experience managing or mentoring junior staff.
* Advanced financial modeling and analysis skills; strong Excel required.
* Ability to communicate complex financial information clearly to non\-finance stakeholders and senior leaders.

  


**To Apply**



As part of your application please attach your resume, cover letter and answer the questions found in the application portal by Friday 26th June 2026\.

  


**We do not recommend the use of AI to complete your application.**

  



Applicants must be eligible to work in the location they are applying for, CPI is unable to offer any visa sponsorship for this role

  



Applications will be assessed on a rolling basis, so we encourage applicants to submit at the earliest opportunity.

  



Only short\-listed applicants will be contacted.

  



Please be sure to add notifications@app.bamboohr.com to your contact list to ensure delivery of all correspondence from us.

  


**Our Commitment**



Climate Policy Initiative is committed to diversity, equity and inclusion and we are working to embed DEI across every facet of our organisation. We seek to establish a working environment where all board members, staff, volunteers, and contractors feel respected and valued regardless of gender, age, race, ethnicity, national origin, sexual orientation or identity, disability, education, or any other bias. We want to create an inclusive culture where all forms of diversity are openly valued as critical to the success of our organization and the achievement of our mission and vision.

  



If you have any support or access requirements, we encourage you to advise us at the time of application. We will then work with you to identify the best way to assist you through the recruitment process.

title: Senior Enterprise Architect (AI Focused)
location: Cape Town, WC, ZA
description:
We are seeking a Senior Enterprise Architect (AI\-Focused) to lead our enterprise AI strategy and drive the design of scalable, cloud\-native AI solutions. This role will focus on agentic AI, multi\-agent systems, RAG architectures, and enterprise AI integration aligned to business goals.


You will establish best practices for AI architecture, orchestration, governance, and responsible AI, while partnering with cross\-functional teams to deliver secure, production\-grade solutions across the organisation.

***We understand the need to provide a flexible working environment partnered with team collaboration and socialisation. Therefore, we operate a hybrid working model with 3 days of working from home per week. This role is based in the Cape Town office.***

**Key Responsibilities**

* Define and lead the enterprise AI architecture strategy, aligning agentic AI capabilities with business goals
* Design and govern scalable AI architectures, including multi agent systems, data pipelines, and model lifecycle management
* Drive adoption of agentic AI frameworks and establish best practices for orchestration, tool usage, and system integration
* Architect and oversee RAG based solutions, ensuring effective retrieval pipelines, embedding strategies, and knowledge integration
* Lead integration of AI solutions across enterprise platforms, APIs, and third\-party services
* Establish standards for prompt engineering, multi\-step orchestration, and agent behaviour design
* Ensure robust governance, including security, compliance, auditability, and responsible AI practices
* Collaborate with engineering, data, and business teams to deliver production grade AI systems
* Provide technical leadership across cloud native AI platforms, particularly within Azure ecosystems
* Mentor teams on AI architecture patterns, emerging technologies, and implementation strategies

**Must Have:**

**Core AI Architecture**

* Experience designing AI solutions using agentic AI patterns, orchestration frameworks, and large language models

**Data, Retrieval \& Integration**

* Strong understanding of data architecture, vector search, retrieval\-augmented generation, APIs, and enterprise system integration

**Cloud \& Platform Architecture**

* Hands\-on experience with Azure AI services, cloud\-native architecture, and deploying secure, scalable AI platforms in production

**Governance, Security \& Delivery**

* Proven ability to define architecture standards covering security, compliance, responsible AI, observability, and production delivery

**Technical Leadership**

* Ability to guide engineering teams on solution design, implementation patterns, and technology choices for enterprise AI adoption

**Knowledge of but not essential:**

**C\#**

* API development

**DevOps**

* CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions)
* Docker
* Infrastructure as Code (Terraform or Bicep)

**Frontend Integration**

* Angular or React for agent\-facing UIs or dashboards

**MCP (Model Context Protocol)**

* Tool integration with agents
* MCP Apps (formerly MCP\-UI) for interactive UI components

**Observability \& Evaluation**

* LangSmith or similar tracing/evaluation tools

**Streaming \& Real\-Time Responses**

* SSE, WebSockets

**Testing Non\-Deterministic AI Outputs**

* Evaluation strategies, golden datasets, regression testing

**Cost Management \& Token Budgeting**

* Token usage, model trade\-offs, caching strategies

**Multi\-Agent Orchestration**

* Designing collaborative agent systems with delegation and handoffs

**Fine\-Tuning / Model Customisation**

* Adapting models for domain\-specific use cases

**Authentication \& Identity**

* OAuth, managed identities

**Logging \& Audit Trails**

* Compliance and traceability for agent decisions/actions

**Additional LLM Providers**

* Experience beyond Azure OpenAI (e.g., Anthropic, open\-source via Ollama/vLLM)

**Graph Databases**

* Neo4j or similar for knowledge graph\-backed agents

**Message Queues / Event\-Driven Architecture**

* Azure Service Bus

**Security \& Guardrails**

* Content filtering, prompt injection mitigation, PII handling

**API Design**

* REST / GraphQL for exposing agent capabilities

**We’re obsessed with making this the best job you’ve ever had!**  

  

We want our teams to love working here, so we’ve created some incredible perks for you to enjoy:

* Join our employee\-led groups to maximise your experience at work such as our Diversity, Equity and Inclusion committee, employee resource groups such as Women and Allies, and our Pride Event Group.
* Enjoy peace of mind over yours and your family’s health with our Private Medical Insurance and Health Cash Plan.
* Invest in our competitive Personal Pension plan and help set you up for your future.
* Big on family? So are we! We understand family is important and being able to spend quality time with your family as it grows is a wonderful experience. Our Parental Leave Program is designed to give you the opportunity to spend even more time with your new arrival(s).
* Enjoy a fantastic work\-life balance with 25 days of annual leave plus Bank Holidays, and finish early 6 times a year with our ‘Flexi’ scheme.
* Income Protection Plans give you the peace of mind you deserve.
* Further your professional development and growth with our generous Tuition Reimbursement Schemes.
* Enjoy the flexibility of working from anywhere in the world for two weeks out of the year!

**About Us**

  

From the day we opened our doors, MRI Software has built flexible, game\-changing real estate software that powers thriving communities and helps make the world a better place to live, work and play. Fulfilling that mission is only possible because of one thing: exceptional people. People like you!

  

Our people\-first approach to PropTech is defining a new industry standard for client experiences that, quite frankly, can’t be duplicated. Experiences that deliver real value every day. And we know those experiences begin with our people.

  

We believe MRI is more than just a workplace; it’s a connected community of people who truly feel they belong. Whether we’re investing in employee resource groups or providing tailored resources for each person to reach their full potential, we’re passionate about creating a work environment that makes you excited to show up every single day.

  

At MRI, one of our core values is to *strive to amaze.* From the intelligent solutions we create to the culture we cultivate, that’s our goal every day. Because that’s what industry leaders do. Whether you’re joining as a new Pride member or rejoining us after a short time away, your talent is vital to us, our partners and our clients.

 **Amazing growth requires amazing employees. Are you up to the challenge?**


We know confidence gap and imposter syndrome can get in the way of meeting remarkable candidates, so please don’t hesitate to apply. We’d love to hear from you!

 *MRI is proud to be an inclusive employer. We welcome and celebrate diversity across all backgrounds, including ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, age, military, veteran status and more.*

*We believe that Belonging is a direct result of Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion. Those values are woven into the fabric of who we are and are foundational to our continued success. Come and see for yourself!*

title: Head of Enterprise Security Architecture & Projects
location: Cape Town, WC, ZA
description:
The Apex Group was established in Bermuda in 2003 and is now one of the world’s largest fund administration and middle office solutions providers.


Our business is unique in its ability to reach globally, service locally and provide cross\-jurisdictional services. With our clients at the heart of everything we do, our hard\-working team has successfully delivered on an unprecedented growth and transformation journey, and we are now represented by over circa 13,000 employees across 112 offices worldwide.Your career with us should reflect your energy and passion.


That’s why, at Apex Group, we will do more than simply ‘empower’ you. We will work to supercharge your unique skills and experience.


Take the lead and we’ll give you the support you need to be at the top of your game. And we offer you the freedom to be a positive disrupter and turn big ideas into bold, industry\-changing realities.


For our business, for clients, and for you

**The Role**


Apex is seeking a **Head of Enterprise Security Architecture \& Projects** to lead its enterprise security architecture function and security project delivery capability. This is a **senior leadership role ac**countable for setting architectural direction, governing secure design, and ensuring the successful delivery of security\-led initiatives across the organization.


You will provide strategic leadership to all Security Architects and a dedicated security project team, acting as the central authority for security architecture decisions while ensuring security initiatives are delivered effectively, consistently, and in alignment with business priorities.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Define and own the enterprise security architecture strategy aligned to Apex’s technology roadmap, risk appetite, and regulatory obligations.
* Ensure Security architects and project managers meet KPI’s and business deliverables.
* Develop roadmaps to enable the expansion of team capabilities to keep up with emerging standards and technologies.
* Lead and manage all Security Architects across application, cloud, infrastructure, data, and emerging technology domains.
* Provide architectural governance and act as the final security design authority for major programs, platforms, and initiatives.
* Translate security strategy, principles, and standards into practical reference architectures, patterns, and roadmaps.
* Oversee the delivery of security\-related projects and programs, ensuring alignment between architecture intent and execution.
* Establish and maintain security architecture governance processes, including design reviews and risk\-based decision\-making.
* Partner closely with Technology, Engineering, Cloud, Data, and Business teams to embed security by design.
* Ensure consistency of security controls and architectural standards across the enterprise.
* Identify architectural risks and technical debt, proposing pragmatic remediation strategies.
* Communicate security architecture decisions, trade\-offs, and risks clearly to senior leadership and governance forums.
* Support audit, regulatory, and assurance activities related to security architecture and program delivery.
* Execute delegated tasks as deemed appropriate by the Group CISO and other empowered Group Cyber leadership authorities, ensuring timely and effective completion in alignment with organizational priorities.
* Support the Group Cyber Strategy end\-to\-end, driving alignment of all activities, decisions, and deliverables with strategic objectives and business outcomes.

**Areas of Specialization**

* **Enterprise Security Architecture:** Definition of security principles, develop and oversee the development of reference architectures, and own governance of security architecture deployment across the organization
* **Application, Cloud \& Infrastructure Architecture:** Secure design of applications, platforms, networks, and hybrid/multi\-cloud environments.
* **Data, AI \& Emerging Technologies:** Security architecture for data platforms, AI\-enabled solutions, and new technology adoption.
* **Security Programs \& Projects:** End\-to\-end ownership of security initiatives, from business requirements gathering through delivery and implementation governance
* **Architecture Governance \& Advisory:** Risk\-based architectural decision\-making, design assurance, and strategic advisory services.

**Qualifications**

* Formal qualification in Information Security, Computer Science, Engineering, or related technology discipline.
* Recognised security architecture qualifications such as **SABSA or TOGAF**, with demonstrated security architecture application.
* Professional security certifications such as **CISSP or CCSP** are strongly preferred.
* Cloud architecture or security certifications (e.g. Azure, AWS or OCI) are desirable.
* Programme or project delivery qualifications are beneficial.

**Required Experience \& Skills**

**Experience:**

* 10\+ years in cybersecurity, enterprise architecture, or senior technology roles within complex environments.
* 8\+ years in senior management positions within security architecture, technical leadership, or cyber \& security program delivery roles.

**Technical Expertise:**

* Proven experience designing and governing enterprise\-wide security architectures across multiple domains.
* Strong understanding of security architecture frameworks and methodologies (e.g., SABSA, TOGAF, Zero Trust).
* Experience leading and coordinating teams of security architects across different specialist areas.
* Demonstrated ability to drive security programs and projects from strategy through to delivery.
* Strong understanding of cloud and hybrid architectures (Azure, AWS, OCI) and modern enterprise platforms.

**Knowledge of Standards:**

* Deep understanding of relevant security standards and frameworks, including but not limited to
	+ SOC1 \& SOC2
	+ NIST Cybersecurity Framework
	+ ISO/IEC 27001 and related standards
	+ CSA Cloud Controls Matrix (CCM)
	+ OWASP principles and secure coding guidelines
	+ Zero Trust principles for modern enterprise security
* Ability to interpret, apply, and enforce these standards within enterprise architecture and security program delivery.
* Proven experience integrating compliance requirements into practical security design and governance processes.

**Leadership \& Communication:**

* Ability to communicate architectural risk, trade\-offs, and outcomes to both technical and non\-technical stakeholders, including executive leadership.

**What will you get in return:**

* Opportunity to lead and shape the enterprise security architecture function within a global organisation.
* Exposure to large\-scale transformation programmes and modern technology platforms.
* Collaboration with senior security, architecture, and technology leaders across Apex.
* A strong focus on leadership development and team growth.
* A chance to make a measurable impact on the organization’s security posture and long\-term resilience.

**Additional information:**


We are an equal opportunity employer and ensure that no applicant is subject to less favourable treatment on the grounds of gender, gender identity, marital status, race, colour, nationality, ethnicity, age, sexual orientation, socio\-economic, responsibilities for dependents, physical or mental disability. Any hiring decisions are made based on skills, qualifications and experiences. We measure our success as a business, not only by delivering great products and services and continually increasing our assets under administration and market share, but also by how we positively impact people, society and the planet. For more information on our commitment to Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) please visit https://theapexgroup.com/csr\-policy/. If you are looking to take the next step in your career and are ready to work for a high performing organization, alongside talented people who take pride in delivering great results, please submit your application (with your CV, cover letter and salary expectations).


 Provide mentoring to and guidance to Enterprise security architects and project managers.


Ensure Security architects and project managers meet KPI’s and business deliverables.


Develop roadmaps to enable the expansion of team capabilities to keep up with emerging standards and technologies.


Develop and oversee development of reference architectures


And own governance of security architecture deployment across the organization.


 From business requirements gathering through delivery and implementation governance.

title: Senior Sales Specialist
location: Cape Town, WC, ZA
description:
Make an impact with NTT DATA
  
Join a company that is pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We are renowned for our technical excellence and leading innovations, and for making a difference to our clients and society. Our workplace embraces diversity and inclusion – it’s a place where you can grow, belong and thrive.
  
  

Your day at NTT DATA
  
As a Senior Cloud Technology Sales Specialist at NTT DATA, you will play a key role in driving our cloud technology solutions and significantly impacting our clients' digital transformation journeys. Your primary focus will be to pursue and secure qualified leads, working closely with our Client Management team and other internal partners to present tailored solutions that address client needs. As a Sales Specialist, you are also responsible for generating your own pipeline and opportunities within your assigned client base.
  
  

You will engage directly with clients at various levels, leveraging your cloud technology expertise to create and deliver compelling value propositions. Your role involves a mix of proactive selling and supporting the sales process, collaborating with pre\-sales architects to design the best solutions for our clients. Building and nurturing strong stakeholder relationships, both with new and existing clients, will be crucial as you explore new business opportunities and territories.
  
  

A significant portion of your time will be spent developing an in\-depth understanding of client business goals and articulating solutions that meet their specific requirements. You'll prepare and conduct client workshops, deliver engaging presentations, and build professional relationships within assigned accounts. Your goal will be to secure deals that align with our sales strategies and meet assigned quotas and targets.
  
  

You'll stay informed about the competitive landscape and market trends, using this knowledge to enhance our solutions and maintain a competitive edge. Collaborating with relevant technology vendors, you'll ensure a deep understanding of their offerings and how they integrate with our own solutions. Your role also involves identifying new sales opportunities within accounts and driving them to closure with the support of our sales teams.
  
  

Applying sales methodologies and tools, such as opportunity and account plans, will help you drive the sales process effectively. By developing and executing your own sales strategy, you'll contribute to the wider territory sales plan and work towards achieving your sales targets. Your advanced business acumen and negotiation abilities will be key in crafting solutions beneficial to both customers and NTT DATA.
  
  

**To thrive in this role, you need to have:**  

* Extensive sales experience in a technology or services environment.
* Proven success in achieving and exceeding sales and financial targets.
* In\-depth knowledge of the cloud technology domain and a strong client\-centric approach.
* Advanced proficiency in delivering engaging sales presentations and team selling approaches.
* Awareness of the competitive landscape and the ability to apply successful sales strategies.
* Strong negotiation skills and the ability to craft solutions beneficial to all stakeholders.
* Excellent business acumen and the ability to maintain accurate sales forecasts and close plans.
* Experience in developing meaningful customer relationships up to senior leadership levels.
* Flexibility to adapt to new missions or urgent deadlines quickly.
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent in information technology/systems, sales, or a related field.
* Industry/Vendor sales certifications required.


**Workplace type:** Hybrid Working
  
  

About NTT DATA
  
NTT DATA is a $30 billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune Global 100\. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through responsible innovation. We are one of the world’s leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with unmatched capabilities in enterprise\-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and application services. Our consulting and industry solutions help organizations and society move confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more than 50 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as established and start\-up partners. NTT DATA is part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each year in RD.
  
  

Equal Opportunity Employer
  
NTT DATA is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer with a global culture that embraces diversity. We are committed to providing an environment free of unfair discrimination and harassment. We do not discriminate based on age, race, colour, gender, sexual orientation, religion, nationality, disability, pregnancy, marital status, veteran status, or any other protected category. Join our growing global team and accelerate your career with us. Apply today.
  
  

Third parties fraudulently posing as NTT DATA recruiters
  
  

NTT DATA recruiters will never ask job seekers or candidates for payment or banking information during the recruitment process, for any reason. Please remain vigilant of third parties who may attempt to impersonate NTT DATA recruiters—whether in writing or by phone—in order to deceptively obtain personal data or money from you. All email communications from an NTT DATA recruiter will come from an nttdata.com email address. If you suspect any fraudulent activity, please contact us.

title: Production Factory Manager
location: Durbanville, WC, ZA
description:
An exciting new design\-led furniture \& joinery venture stablished in Durbanville. The factory is under construction; the team is being built; systems are being designed. We are looking for a Production/Factory Manager who has done this before: someone who can walk into a new facility, make it operational, and build a culture of precision and accountability from day one.

You will report directly to the Executive Manager/CEO, act as second\-in\-charge, and take full ownership of how this factory runs \- from fit\-out and commissioning through to steady\-state production.The work we do is complex, bespoke, and uncompromising. Our clients are architects, interior designers, and premium developers who expect exceptional quality and reliable delivery. That standard starts on the factory floor.

If you are energised by the challenge of building something properly from scratch \- read on.

Key Responsibilities

**Factory Setup \& Commissioning**

* Participate in factory fit\-out, equipment installation, and workflow design ahead of production launch.
* Commission CNC routers, beam saws, edge banders, and solid wood processing equipment.
* Design production floor layout and material flow for a high\-mix, low\-volume bespoke environment.
* Build the QC, planning, and reporting systems from the ground up.

**Operational Leadership**

* Take ownership of factory operations: production, planning, scheduling, and workflow.
* Drive output, quality, and on\-time delivery in a bespoke, deadline\-driven environment.
* Implement and manage production strategies aligned with business objectives.
* Act as 2IC to the Executive Manager by contributing to operational and strategic decision\-making at a senior level.
* Monitor project timelines, costs, and margins; collaborate closely with design, sales, and project teams.

**People \& Team Building**

* Recruit, onboard, and develop a production team expected to grow to 30\+ staff.
* Build and lead a team of supervisors, foremen, and artisans \- instilling a culture of quality and accountability.
* Drive performance, training, and succession planning as the business scales.

**Technical \& Production Management**

* Interpret and manage production from technical drawings (AutoCAD or similar).
* Manage cutting lists, nesting, material flow, and production sequencing.
* Optimise machine utilisation incl. CNC routers, beam saws, edge banders, and solid wood processing equipment.
* Drive integration of CNC and digital workflows into the broader production system.
* Ensure all products are manufactured to specification, Right First Time, to luxury finishing standards.

**Quality \& Continuous Improvement**

* Design and implement QC systems appropriate for high\-end bespoke manufacturing.
* Drive continuous improvement \- reduce waste, rework, and inefficiencies across production process.
* Implement KPI and reporting frameworks that provide data re factory performance.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives (Lean / Six Sigma advantageous).

**Systems \& Technology**

* Drive integration of CNC and digital workflows into the broader production system.
* Build reporting infrastructure for output, efficiency, and quality metrics.
* Utilise and optimise AutoCAD / CAD / CAM systems.

Qualifications \& Skills

Experience

* Minimum 15 years in furniture manufacturing or architectural joinery.
* Proven track record managing an established production facility (ideally with experience in setup or significant expansion).
* Bespoke / custom manufacturing experience is essential. Mass production backgrounds will not translate here.
* Strong hands\-on experience with CNC machinery and automated production environments.
* Demonstrated ability to lead and develop teams of 20 to 50\+ people.

Technical Skills

* Proficient in AutoCAD or equivalent CAD software.
* Deep understanding of cabinetmaking, joinery systems, and solid wood and board manufacturing processes.
* Solid grasp of production planning, scheduling, and factory workflow management.

Leadership \& Mindset

* Operates equally comfortably at the executive table and on the factory floor.
* Builder mentality \- energised by creating structure, not just maintaining it.
* High attention to detail and an instinctive feel for luxury finishing standards.
* Commercially aware, cost\-conscious, and comfortable working closely with designers, architects, and clients.
* Performs under pressure without compromising on quality

Advantageous

* Qualification or certification in Lean Manufacturing or Six Sigma (Preferred).
* Experience in high\-end architectural or interior manufacturing environments.
* Exposure to ERP or production management software implementation.

Work Location: In person

title: Senior/Lead Technical Architect
location: Cape Town, WC, ZA
description:
**About the company****Utopia** is an ultra\-luxury hospitality and lifestyle brand creating a global ecosystem of properties and experiences.


We develop private villa retreats in beautiful locations around the world, each with high\-end service. **Utopia** also offers a wider ecosystem of leisure experiences and services available both to those staying on property and to external visitors.

**Utopia** designs and builds its properties in\-house. Our team works across the full journey: from concept and architecture to construction, interiors, landscape, guest experience, and long\-term operation. For architects and designers, this means working on properties from the ground up, with the ability to influence how each place is planned, built, and experienced. For hospitality professionals, it means joining a brand where service is personal, attentive, and built around each guest’s stay.


We’re a young, ambitious team with high standards and a hands\-on approach. We value strong ideas, practical thinking, attention to detail, and people who are ready to take responsibility for their part of the work. If you’re interested in architecture, design, hospitality, or guest experience, we invite you to grow with **Utopia.**

**About the role**
We're looking for a technically rigorous **Senior/Lead Technical Architect** to translate design intent into fully coordinated, precise, and buildable documentation across our boutique hospitality projects. You will serve as the key technical authority within the design team — bridging concept and construction across RIBA Stages 3–5, while collaborating closely with design, engineering, and procurement. This role exists to ensure that quality, constructability, and coordination are preserved from design development through delivery.

**Location \& Collaboration Format*** This is a fully remote collaboration.
* We collaborate in Сentral European/ UK timezones.
* Utopia does not provide visa sponsorship or a relocation package for this position.

**Responsibilities:*** Translate concept and schematic designs into coordinated, buildable Revit models and full documentation packages across RIBA Stages 3–5\.
* Develop precise technical layouts, assemblies, and construction\-level details in Revit, ensuring alignment with design intent, constructability, and regulatory requirements.
* Coordinate architectural models with structural, MEP, and interior design inputs using BIM workflows and Navisworks; resolve and prevent cross\-discipline clashes.
* Lead the development of project\-specific façade, roof, and technical typologies grounded in construction logic and material performance.
* Own quality control across Revit models and documentation; conduct technical reviews and flag risks proactively.
* Build and manage project families, typologies, and detail libraries to support efficient design development and team\-wide standardization.
* Support tender and construction documentation, ensuring full alignment with specifications, codes, and local regulations.
* Collaborate with the procurement team on technical inputs related to material quantities, specifications, and product compatibility.
* Supervise and guide BIM modelers and junior technical staff; contribute to building department\-wide technical workflows and standards.

**Requirements:*** Bachelor's or Master's degree in Architecture.
* 5–10 years of experience in architectural design, with a strong focus on technical development and construction documentation.
* Demonstrated experience on low\-rise residential and hospitality projects — private homes, villas, hotels, or resorts.
* Expert proficiency in Revit, including parametric families, freeform modeling, and terrain modeling.
* Hands\-on experience with Navisworks for BIM coordination and clash detection.
* Solid understanding of construction methodologies, material performance, and multi\-disciplinary integration.
* Fluent English, written and verbal.
* Portfolio required.

 **Nice to Have:**

* Proficiency in Rhino, AutoCAD, or Enscape.
* Experience contributing to early\-stage feasibility or RIBA Stage 1–2 design inputs.
* Familiarity with BIM automation tools and emerging technical design workflows.

**We Offer:*** **Global project exposure** — collaborate on luxury hospitality projects across Europe, Africa, and Latin America.
* **A truly international team** — collaborate across cultures, disciplines, and time zones with people bringing diverse perspectives and expertise.
* **High ownership environment** — we value initiative, independent thinking, and people who are ready to take responsibility for meaningful work.

* **Work on projects from concept to realization** — contribute across the full architectural journey, from early vision and planning to execution and operational experience.
* **Cross\-disciplinary collaboration** — collaborate closely with interiors, landscape, construction, operations, and guest experience teams from the earliest stages.
* **High design standards** — join a team deeply focused on detail, materiality, atmosphere, and timeless hospitality design.

title: Performance Marketing Manager - Capetown
location: Kenilworth, WC, ZA
description:
**We’re building something big.**

SUPA is redefining convenience in South Africa. We deliver groceries, snacks, drinks, and daily essentials in under 20 minutes. No planning. No waiting. Just get it now.

To make this happen, we operate highly efficient online fulfillment hubs, and we need a world\-class growth engine to match our operational speed. We are looking for a highly analytical and driven **Performance Marketing Manager** to own, build, and scale our paid acquisition strategy from the ground up.

**The Role**

This is not a standard “run ads and report on clicks” role. You will be the architect of our paid growth engine.

Your ultimate mandate is to drive high\-quality app installs and convert those installs into active, first\-time ordering customers. If you have a track record of scaling app campaigns, managing significant ad spend, and turning marketing budgets into real, measurable revenue, this is the opportunity for you.

**Key Responsibilities**

* **Scale Acquisition Campaigns:** Strategize, launch, and aggressively scale paid campaigns across Meta Platforms, Google App Campaigns, and emerging channels.
* **Full\-Funnel Optimisation:** Relentlessly optimize every touchpoint of the user journey—from the initial ad hook and click to the App Store page, install, and the critical first order.
* **Drive Cost Efficiency:** Continuously monitor and reduce Cost Per Install (CPI) and Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) while scaling volume.
* **Lead Creative Strategy:** Brief, test, and iterate on high\-performing creative assets. You will identify winning hooks, angles, and ad formats that resonate with our target audience.
* **Data\-Driven Decision Making:** Analyze daily performance metrics using AppMetrica (and similar attribution tools) to allocate budgets dynamically toward the highest\-performing campaigns.
* **Cross\-Functional Collaboration:** Work closely with the broader team, including product and operations, to align marketing pushes with inventory capacity and new fulfillment hub launches.

**What We’re Looking For**

* **Proven Experience:** 3\+ years of direct, hands\-on experience running and scaling mobile app install campaigns with substantial budgets.
* **Platform Mastery:** Deep technical expertise within Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads (specifically Google App Campaigns).
* **Analytical Rigor:** A profound understanding of unit economics and performance metrics, including CPI, CAC, LTV, ROAS, and cohort retention.
* **Performance Mindset:** You prioritize hard business results and revenue over vanity metrics like impressions or broad reach.
* **Agile Execution:** Strong testing instincts with the ability to set up A/B tests rapidly, fail fast, learn, and scale what works.

**Bonus Points If You Have:**

* Hands\-on experience with mobile measurement partners (MMPs) like AppsFlyer, Branch.io, or Adjust.
* Previous experience marketing in the rapid delivery, e\-commerce, or on\-demand platform space.

**Why This Role Is Different**

* **True Ownership:** You won’t just be a cog in a marketing machine; you will own app growth and build the acquisition engine from day one.
* **Tangible Impact:** Your work will directly dictate our daily order volume, revenue, and market scale.
* **Real Demand:** You will be marketing a product with incredible product\-market fit, strong unit economics, and immediate utility for the customer.
* **Growth Environment:** Join a fast\-paced, high\-performing team that values rapid execution, innovative thinking, and continuous improvement.

Application Question(s):

* Have you worked for a start up before
* What is your salary expectations
* Have you managed a team before and how many staff reported to you

Education:

* Diploma (Preferred)

Experience:

* Scaling mobile app install: 3 years (Required)
* Budges: 2 years (Required)
* Google Ads: 2 years (Required)
* Meta Ads: 1 year (Required)
* Set up A/B tests: 1 year (Required)

title: Senior Salesforce Data Cloud Specialist
location: Northern Suburbs, WC, ZA
description:
Are you an architectural expert ready to build the "Single Version of Truth" for one of South Africa's largest retailers? PEP is seeking a highly skilled Senior Salesforce Data Cloud Specialist to join our team and become the custodian of our customer data revolution.This role is pivotal in strategically ingesting, harmonizing, and activating millions of customer data points to enable real\-time, data\-driven customer engagement. You will ensure our data architecture is high\-performing and cost\-effective, directly managing Salesforce Consumption Model efficiency and maximizing ROI on Flex Credits
  

Key Responsibilities


* Strategic Data Architecture \& Ingestion: Architect "Activation\-Ready" data flows from POS, Fintech, and Loyalty systems, while ensuring a high data velocity. Design and maintain the Data Model Object (DMO) mapping strategy and relational data models that underpin unified customer profiles.
* Technical Segmentation \& Insight Enablement: Build high\-performance segments and deploy Data Science propensity and churn models into actionable Data Cloud segments, reducing time\-to\-market for complex audience creation. Surface segmentation capabilities and data insights to marketing stakeholders in accessible, non\-technical formats
* Data Integrity \& Compliance: Act as the final authority on data accuracy, ensuring 100% variance reconciliation and zero incidents of POPIA non\-compliance, including successful automation of "Right to be Forgotten" requests. Implement and maintain consent management and suppression data flows that feed correctly into Marketing Cloud exclusion logic
* Operational Automation: Drive real\-time business actions with a \>95% success rate of Data Actions triggering journeys in Marketing Cloud.
* Reporting, Analytics \& Stakeholder Enablement:Build and maintain data pipelines that feed campaign performance dashboards in Marketing Intelligence (new SKU previously known as MCI) on Salesforce core platform. Present data architecture decisions, platform health metrics, and consumption reports to senior and executive stakeholders

  




Required Knowledge, Skills and Competencies


* Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Analytics, or a related field.
* A Salesforce Data Cloud Consultant certification is required.
* A Salesforce Data Architect or Marketing Cloud Consultant certification would be an added advantage.
* Minimum 5 years of experience in Data Architecture, Data Engineering, or the Salesforce Ecosystem.
* 3\+ years of hands\-on experience specifically within Salesforce Data Cloud.
* Proven track record in a high\-volume Retail or Fintech environment managing millions of records.
* Expert SQL Proficiency for complex Data Cloud Calculated Insights (PostgreSQL/Amazon Redshift syntax).
* Expert understanding of Data Modeling, DMO mapping, and relational data models.
* Comprehensive knowledge of the MarTech Ecosystem, including Data Cloud interaction with Marketing Cloud and Personalization (Interaction Studio).
* Strategic understanding of Identity Resolution (fuzzy vs. exact matching logic).
* Literacy in consumption\-based software models and budget optimization.
* Practical application of POPIA and GDPR compliance within data architecture.
* Experience with REST API and Streaming Ingestion into Data Cloud
* Knowledge of Marketing Cloud Connect configuration and Connected Audiences setup
* Familiarity with event\-driven architecture or real\-time streaming technologies (e.g., Kafka, GCP Pub/Sub, Dataflow, Apigee) for POS/Fintech source system integration
* Understanding of GCP and Salesforce Data Cloud integration patterns, including BigQuery zero\-copy connector, GCP\-based data pipelines feeding Data Cloud, and the strategic value of the GCP \+ Salesforce "Better Together" approach to hyper\-personalisation
* We are looking for a candidate with a strong blend of technical expertise and commercial acumen in a high\-volume retail or fintech environment.

  




Competencies: Devotion to quality, Structuring, Performing under pressure, Initiative, Leadership, Organisational sensitivity, Innovating, Analysing and forming opinions

  



Closing date: Friday, 12 June 2026  



If you are interested and meet the minimum requirements, please submit your CV.

  



If you do not hear from us within 4 weeks of the closing date of this position, please regard your application as being unsuccessful.

  




PEP strives for equal opportunity in terms of its employment equity guidelines.

title: Technical Architect
location: Cape Town, WC, ZA
description:
### **Who We Are**



VML, part of WPP, is a leading creative company that combines brand experience, customer experience, and commerce, creating connected brands to drive growth. VML is celebrated for its innovative and human first, award\-winning work for blue chip client partners including AstraZeneca, Colgate\-Palmolive, Dell, Ford, Microsoft, Nestlé, The Coca\-Cola Company, and Wendy's. The agency is recognized by the Forrester Wave™ Reports, as a Leader among Marketing Creative and Content Service Providers, Commerce Services, Global Digital Experience Services, Global Marketing Services and, most recently, Marketing Measurement \& Optimization. In addition, VML's specialist health network, VML Health, is one of the world's largest and most awarded health agencies. VML's global network is powered by 26,000 talented people across 55\+ markets, with principal offices in Kansas City, New York, Detroit, London, São Paulo, Shanghai, Singapore, and Sydney.


**About WPP**



WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world's leading brands. We unite cutting\-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world\-class creativity, next\-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel in a single company – powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open, to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. For more information, visit WPP.com.

**Overview**



As a Senior Technical / Solutions Architect within the VML EMEA Enablement Team, you will be a pivotal figure in shaping the technical direction and delivery of strategic solutions for our diverse client portfolio. You will bridge the gap between client vision, business requirements, and technical execution, leading the entire solutions lifecycle from initial engagement and scoping through to design, development support, and successful deployment. This role demands a strong blend of technical expertise, client\-facing acumen, and leadership, driving innovation and fostering a culture of excellence within our development teams.


**Key responsibilities**


**Client Engagement \& Strategy:**


* Engage with existing and prospective clients to deeply understand their business challenges and strategic objectives.
* Lead technical client engagements, from initial scoping and requirements gathering to crafting comprehensive solution proposals and detailed solution design documentation.
* Collaborate closely with Client Leads and Business Development teams to gain a holistic understanding of client expectations, business constraints, and opportunities.


**Solution Design \& Delivery Oversight:**


* Define project scope, technical specifications, and architectural frameworks for software solutions of medium to high complexity.
* Present solutions directly to clients, providing clear feedback, ensuring solution alignment with business goals, and communicating project updates.
* Prepare and deliver reports, presentations, and demonstrations to keep clients informed on project progress, integration points, deployment strategies, and any technical considerations or challenges.


**Technical Leadership \& Team Support:**


* Act as a primary technical liaison between clients and development teams, translating business needs into technical requirements and vice versa.
* Provide expert technical solution recommendations and support the operational delivery of solutions across various platforms.
* Drive process excellence and technical innovation, particularly in the seamless handover of technical solutions and documentation to development teams.
* Actively engage with developers, consultants, and project managers to ensure successful execution of engagements.


**Technical Specialisation \& Project Involvement:**


* Contribute to and lead efforts in:
	+ Solution design and architecture (medium to high complexity).
	+ Defining and adhering to data and technology governance principles.
	+ Advanced scripting and query development.
	+ Developing robust data mapping and extract strategies.
	+ Designing and optimising relational data models and data schemas.
	+ Providing high\-level technical support for complex client requests.
	+ Participating in and leading advanced technical projects.
	+ Designing and implementing integrations between marketing and data platforms.
	+ Developing web services and API solutions.
	+ Leading custom reporting and custom application development projects.
	+ HTML creation for webpages and emails.
	+ Webpage builds using the jQuery framework.
* Leverage native scripting languages to solve requirements in the most effective, optimal, and scalable manner.


**Mentorship \& Continuous Improvement:**


* Actively mentor and facilitate knowledge transfer within the broader developer team, fostering growth and technical excellence.
* Stay abreast of new technologies, industry trends, and emerging best practices, assessing their applicability and championing their introduction to the development team and wider organisation where beneficial.


**Required Skills \& Experience**


**Extensive Marketing Technology Expertise:**



Extensive hands\-on experience with marketing technology stacks covering marketing data, production, content management, planning, implementation, and various channel use (e.g., email, web, mobile, CRM, Audience Management, and Analytics). Proficiency with popular enterprise technology stacks including, but not limited to, Google (e.g., GCP, GA4\), Adobe (e.g., Experience Cloud, AEM), Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Salesforce Data Cloud, Salesforce Personalisation, AWS, and Snowflake.


**Core Marketing Functional Experience:** Demonstrated expertise in:


* Customer Data Platforms (CDP)
* Personalisation strategies and implementation
* Direct Digital marketing channels (Mobile, Email, SMS, MMS \& Push)
* CMS \& Content arbitration/automation
* Web Analytics and data interpretation
* **Strategic \& Client\-Facing Acumen:** Exceptional ability to understand unique business requirements of customers across multiple industries and translate these needs into a compelling technical vision and roadmap, effectively presenting solutions to both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* **Solution Engineering Leadership: A** proven track record in leading the design and delivery of complex technical solutions, from concept to deployment.
* **Middleware \& Integration Architecture:** Ability to architect and develop robust middleware solutions for integrating various technology stacks and platforms, including API design and development.
* **Data Expertise:** Strong experience with SQL, relational databases (e.g., MSSQL, MySQL), advanced scripting for data manipulation, and comprehensive data modelling.
* **Team Leadership \& Mentorship:** Experience in leading and managing technical or development teams.
* **Process \& Methodologies:** Experience working effectively within a Project Management Office (PMO) framework and applying best practice development methodologies (e.g., Agile, Scrum).
* **Communication \& Collaboration:** Solid oral and written interpersonal communication skills, strong relationship\-building abilities, and proven capability to work effectively as part of a cross\-functional team in varied, fast\-paced environments.
* **Time Management:** Proven ability to manage multiple priorities, projects, and deadlines effectively in a dynamic, high\-pressure environment.
* **Continuous Learning \& Passion:** An inquisitive, practical, and passionate approach to technology, with a commitment to continuous learning, sharing knowledge, and staying abreast of industry trends.
* **Travel:** Willingness and ability to travel occasionally for client engagements or team meetings within the EMEA region.
* **Experience Threshold:** Some experience in hands\-on marketing technology or solutions architecture experience.


**Preferred Skills \& Experience (Beneficial)**



Candidates demonstrating some or all the following will be at an advantage:


* **Academic Background:**Bachelor's degree in information systems or computer science, or a closely related technical field.
* **Advanced CDP \& CRM Knowledge:**Deeper experience with CDP \& CRM platforms, including an understanding of complex data models, database marketing principles, and customer/product lifecycle management strategies.
* **Certifications:**Relevant Data or Architecture certifications (e.g., AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Salesforce Certified Technical Architect, Google Cloud Architect, Azure Solutions Architect).
* **Development Experience:**Knowledge or hands\-on experience with software development in mobile (iOS or Android) or web development (e.g., PHP, ASP.NET Core, Python).
* **Industry Experience:** Previous experience working within the Automotive industry.

* Collaborate with a team of interior designers, and 3D artists through every stage of project development

* Work closely with the Head of Design and key client representatives
* Ensure alignment with RIBA stages, and facilitate technical design through to construction.

 **CV Requirements**

* Bachelor's or Master's Degree in Interior Architecture, Interior Design or Architecture
* 10\+ years of experience in architectural design

* Portfolio demonstrating conceptual excellence and execution on high\-end residential and hospitality projects
* Proven design ownership from concept to construction, ideally across multiple global locations
* Deep understanding of interior architecture processes and RIBA project stages
* Previous work with luxury brands or high\-expectation clients

* Proficiency in AutoCAD, SketchUp, Adobe Creative Suite

* Excellent communication and presentation skills
* professional level of English, Spanish is a plus
* Ability to work remotely

 **What We Offer**

* **Work on projects from concept to realization:** contribute across the full architectural journey, from early vision and planning to execution and operational experience.
* **Design with long\-term impact**: create spaces intended to become globally recognized hospitality destinations.

### **Job Description**


We are seeking an experienced DevOps Engineer to join a high\-performing technology team supporting a large\-scale retail environment. The successful candidate will be responsible for designing, implementing, automating, and supporting software delivery pipelines, infrastructure platforms, and operational processes across on\-premises and multi\-cloud environments.

  

This role requires a strong understanding of modern DevOps practices, infrastructure automation, CI/CD, observability, cloud platforms, disaster recovery, and operational excellence. The engineer will play a key role in our transformation journey as we migrate from Azure DevOps Server to GitHub Enterprise and standardise Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform.

  

Given the nature of retail operations, the role demands a strong focus on platform reliability, resilience, disaster recovery, and 24/7 system availability.

 **Key Responsibilities**

 **DevOps \& CI/CD**

  

* Design, build, and maintain CI/CD pipelines for .NET and related application workloads.
* Support and optimize Azure DevOps Server while contributing to the migration strategy towards GitHub Enterprise.
* Implement DevSecOps best practices across the software development lifecycle.
* Automate build, test, deployment, and release processes.
* Improve deployment frequency, quality, and reliability through automation.

 **Infrastructure \& Platform Engineering**

  

* Manage and support hybrid infrastructure environments spanning:
+ On\-premises data centres
+ Microsoft Azure
+ Amazon Web Services (AWS)

* Develop and maintain Infrastructure as Code solutions using Terraform.

 **Cloud Engineering**

  

* Design and implement cloud\-native and hybrid solutions.

 **Observability \& Operational Excellence**

 **Disaster Recovery \& Business Continuity**

  

* Maintain and improve disaster recovery processes and procedures.
* Conduct DR testing and validation exercises.
* Ensure critical systems meet recovery time objectives (RTO) and recovery point objectives (RPO).

 **Reliability Engineering**

  

* Improve platform resilience, scalability, and availability.
* Support highly available environments including:
+ IIS Web Farms
+ F5 Load Balancers
+ Multi\-cloud services

* Participate in on\-call support and major incident resolution where required.

 **Collaboration**

  

* Work closely with Software Engineers, Systems Analysts, Infrastructure Engineers, Security teams, and Architects.
* Mentor development teams on DevOps best practices.
* Promote a culture of automation, continuous improvement, and operational excellence.

 **Required Technical Skills**

 **DevOps \& Automation**

title: Hubspot Administrator
location: Cape Town, WC, ZA
description:
**WHAT WE DO**  

 We build innovative fintech products to help SMEs make cash flow. From instant access to funding to all\-in\-one business banking accounts, we're on it! Our purpose is to help SMEs manage their business better, faster, simpler, Lula, so they can spend more time doing what they love. Speaking of love, we're looking for Lulas who love to make a difference to join our team and change the game.


**CULTURE CODE**

* **We're Driven by Purpose \-** We are passionate and committed to delivering the best products and services for SMEs


* **We Execute with Ambition** \- We set ambitious goals, embrace challenges, and deliver with focus and determination.

  

  

**OVERALL PURPOSE**


We're seeking a highly motivated and experienced HubSpot Administrator to join our growing team as the primary architect and gatekeeper of our CRM ecosystem. In this role, you will take full ownership of database health, user governance, and complex process automations while ensuring seamless, bi\-directional integrations across our core tech stack \- including Zendesk, Snowflake, and Apollo.


Working directly with our CRM \+ Centre Of Excellence Lead and collaboratively with cross\-functional teams like Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, and Data Engineering, you will eliminate operational friction, optimise tool ROI, and build a high\-performance CRM backbone that translates raw data into powerful business insights to help our commercial teams thrive.

  

  

**RESPONSIBILITIES**


**Platform Architecture \& Data Governance**


* Strategy Execution \& Maintenance: Operationally execute the overarching CRM strategy as crafted by the CRM Lead, while simultaneously managing day\-to\-day platform administration, system maintenance, and database health.
* System Ownership: Act as the primary administrator and architect of our HubSpot CRM, ensuring optimal database health, duplication control, and clean data hygiene.
* User Management: Oversee onboarding, offboarding, permission sets, and security profiles for 120\+ cross\-functional users in conjunction with our TechOps team.
* Process Automation: Design, test, and deploy complex workflows, custom objects, and advanced pipeline automations to drive operational efficiency.


**Tech Stack Integration \& Optimization**


* Integration Management: Maintain, monitor, and optimize deep bi\-directional syncs between HubSpot and our core stack:
* Zendesk Support: Ensuring seamless handoffs between Sales, Customer Success, and Support teams.
* Snowflake: Collaborating with Data Engineering to pipeline CRM data cleanly into our data warehouse for advanced BI reporting.
* Twilio \& Apollo: Optimizing outbound/inbound communication workflows and data\-enrichment pathways.
* Convertflow: Ensuring marketing conversion funnels map accurately to contact properties and lifecycles.
* Troubleshooting: Serve as the first line of defense for integration errors, resolving API or webhook sync failures before they impact the front lines.


**Insights \& Financial Acumen**


* Build and maintain advanced dashboards tracking key performance metrics, pipeline velocity, and conversion rates.
* Analyse usage patterns of connected tools (like Apollo and Twilio) to help leadership manage licensing costs and maximize our Return on Investment (ROI)**.**

* Proven track record of managing native and custom integrations, specifically with Zendesk and Snowflake (or similar data warehouses).
* Comfortable with mapping complex data schemas.
* Strong understanding of relational databases and data flow logic.
* Basic SQL knowledge is a major plus.
* Ability to translate complex technical bottlenecks into business impact statements for leadership, and clear instructional guides for end\-users.
* Experience in a FinTech or fast\-scaling startup environment and/or in distributed teams is a plus.

title: Network Specialist
location: Cape Town, WC, ZA
description:
**About Us**
------------


Step into the wild world of OneDayOnly – South Africa's OG daily deals hub. We're the pioneers of cool discounts, hitting you for just one day because, well, why overcomplicate things? We've got the big names, top suppliers, and a dash of our secret sauce to make you feel like a BIG DEAL. Not to brag, but we have over a million potential savvy shoppers getting our daily dose every 24 hours.


We're not fussy – if the price is right and the quality checks out, we're selling it. That's what makes us the go\-to for both the smart buyer and the eager seller. Toss in the urgency of our deals, and boom, success happens quicker than you can blink. So, jump in, where FOMO meets killer deals, and let's turn every day into a retail party!

**About You**
-------------


You’re a network and infrastructure specialist who lives and breathes connectivity. With broad expertise across enterprise networking platforms \- including Ubiquiti UniFi, Cisco, HP Aruba, Sophos, and Fortinet \- you don’t just maintain networks \- you architect them for peak performance and reliability. You understand that in a fast\-paced e\-commerce environment, network downtime isn’t an option, and you proactively monitor, optimize, and secure our infrastructure to keep business flowing seamlessly.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

**Network Design and Deployment**

* Analyze business and technical requirements to design and establish optimal network infrastructure
* Install, configure, and deploy network hardware including access points, managed switches, security gateways, and firewalls across platforms such as Ubiquiti UniFi, HP Aruba, Sophos, and Fortinet
* Plan and execute network expansion projects to support organizational growth
* Design and implement both wired and wireless network solutions that ensure seamless connectivity across all office locations

**Performance Monitoring and Management**

* Continuously monitor network performance using platform management tools (UniFi Controller, HP Aruba Central, and equivalent) as well as broader infrastructure monitoring solutions
* Optimize network configurations for maximum speed, reliability, and efficiency
* Manage bandwidth allocation and server capacity to meet user demand
* Conduct regular performance assessments and implement improvements proactively
* Generate and analyze network performance reports to identify trends and potential issues

**Troubleshooting and Maintenance**

* Perform comprehensive diagnostics to identify and resolve network connectivity issues
* Ensure high availability and minimal service interruption through proactive maintenance
* Respond promptly to network incidents and implement effective solutions
* Coordinate firmware updates and patches for all network equipment
* Maintain network uptime and reliability standards aligned with business objectives

**Security Implementation**

* Implement, monitor, and evaluate network security protocols and measures
* Configure and manage firewalls, web filter policies, SSLVPN, IPSEC tunnels, SD\-WAN, and secure access controls across multi\-site environments
* Conduct regular security audits and vulnerability assessments
* Respond to security incidents and implement preventative measures
* Ensure compliance with data protection regulations and company security policies

**Server and Infrastructure Administration**

* Install, configure, and maintain Windows Server environments (2012 through 2025\), including upgrades, patch management, and performance tuning
* Manage Active Directory, Group Policy, and DHCP across the organisation
* Oversee virtualisation platforms including Proxmox, VMware, and Microsoft Azure, including cloud\-to\-on\-premises migrations
* Manage endpoint deployment and software distribution using Microsoft SCCM/Endpoint Configuration Manager
* Administer Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace environments, including user provisioning, group management, and collaboration tooling
* Plan and execute server migration and infrastructure refresh projects, including physical server relocations and cloud\-to\-on\-premises transitions
* Manage and monitor backup solutions to ensure data integrity and business continuity

**ISP Relations and Management**

* Serve as the primary point of contact for Internet Service Provider relationships
* Negotiate service level agreements and manage ISP performance expectations
* Troubleshoot ISP connectivity issues and coordinate resolution efforts
* Evaluate ISP services and recommend optimizations or changes as needed
* Manage failover solutions and backup connectivity options

**Documentation and Standards**

* Maintain comprehensive and accurate documentation of network configurations, topologies, and policies
* Document standard operating procedures for network operations and troubleshooting
* Create and update network diagrams and asset inventories
* Ensure all changes are properly documented and communicated to relevant stakeholders

**Equipment and Software Management**

* Install and configure network equipment and software, including end\-user networking accessories
* Manage the lifecycle of network hardware, coordinating upgrades and replacements
* Ensure proper inventory management of all network\-related assets
* Evaluate new networking technologies and make recommendations for adoption

**User Support and Training**

* Provide technical support to end\-users for network connectivity issues
* Train staff on secure network usage and best practices
* Collaborate with the IT team to resolve cross\-functional technical challenges
* Communicate network changes, maintenance windows, and updates effectively to users

**Continuous Improvement**

* Stay current with enterprise networking and infrastructure platform updates, including Ubiquiti UniFi, Cisco, HP Aruba, Microsoft, and virtualisation technologies
* Participate in ongoing professional development and industry training
* Research and recommend emerging network technologies that could benefit the organization
* Contribute to IT strategy discussions with insights on network infrastructure needs

**Experience and Qualifications**
---------------------------------

* Degree or diploma in Information Technology, Computer Science, Network Engineering, or a related field is preferred, but relevant experience will be considered
* Minimum 3–5 years of hands\-on experience managing enterprise network infrastructure, including switches, firewalls, access points, and VPN solutions across platforms such as Ubiquiti UniFi, Cisco, HP Aruba, Sophos, or Fortinet (required)
* Proven experience in designing, deploying, and managing enterprise\-level wired and wireless networks
* Strong knowledge of network protocols (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VLANs, routing, switching)
* Experience with network security implementation including firewalls, VPNs, and access controls
* Demonstrated ability to troubleshoot complex network issues efficiently
* Experience managing ISP relationships and coordinating connectivity solutions
* Excellent problem\-solving skills and the ability to work independently
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to explain technical concepts to non\-technical users
* Project management capabilities with experience delivering network projects on time and within scope
* Certifications such as CompTIA A\+, CompTIA Network\+, Microsoft 365 Certified: Endpoint Administrator Associate, Ubiquiti Certified Professional, CCNA, CCNP or equivalent are highly advantageous
* Hands\-on experience with Windows Server administration, Active Directory, Group Policy, DHCP, and virtualisation platforms (Proxmox, VMware, Azure)
* Knowledge of network monitoring and management tools
* Experience with documentation and maintaining technical records
* Ability to work in a fast\-paced e\-commerce environment where uptime is critical
* Assertive, proactive, and innovative approach to network management
* Strong work ethic and commitment to operational excellence

**Values**
----------

* **Challenge Accepted:** We are the company's reliable foundation. We own every issue from start to finish, remain calm under pressure, and are relentless in our pursuit of solutions that ensure business continuity.
* **Solve Smart:** We look beyond the immediate fix to find the root cause. We leverage automation, foresight, and strategic planning to build resilient systems and eliminate problems before they impact the business.
* **Character Counts:** We are trusted guardians of the company’s systems and information. We operate with absolute integrity, communicate with transparency, and handle all matters with the discretion and confidentiality our role demands.
* **Customer Obsessed:** We succeed when our colleagues succeed. We listen with empathy, communicate clearly and jargon\-free, and dedicate ourselves to providing timely and effective solutions that empower our colleagues to do their best work.
* **Seriously Unserious:** We take our work, but not ourselves, too seriously. We use positivity and patience to make technology less intimidating for everyone, while supporting each other as a team through every challenge.

We deliver focused investment services through specialist teams, partner with acclaimed financial intermediaries and pride ourselves on our superior products and solutions and high quality service. We offer a comprehensive range of investment solutions, designed to assist in the creation and preservation of wealth. Our offering encompasses local investments, including fixed term investments and investments with guarantees, international investments, retirement saving solutions, and retirement income solutions. While each solution has its own distinct purpose, they all share the world\-class quality and commitment that have come to distinguish Glacier.
**What will you do?**

The Systems Analyst will play a critical role as a problem solver and be the person who assists in defining and enabling business change in an agile environment. Your primary responsibility is to design and deliver solutions that help optimize processes and reduce inefficiencies. This role will be based at the Glacier Head Office in  

Cape Town.

Key outcomes

The following outcomes will be expected to be achieved by the Systems Analyst:
* Performing detailed impact analysis including process, gap, and data analysis.
* Facilitation of work\-sessions, database design and solution workshops to gather information, elicit and finalize functional requirements as well as transfer knowledge.
* Analyze how the business requirements will be met by introducing changes to the application/s or creating modern technology implementations.
* Examine existing systems to identify areas for improvement and integration as part of the solution design, consider non\-functional requirements that describe the characteristics of the system e.g., security, performance, maintainability, scalability, usability, and reliability of a product.
* Ensure system designs are aligned with business goals \& requirements and ensuring that requirements are accurate and complete.
* Collaborate with developers and testers during sprints to ensure that system changes are implemented correctly, in an agile team within a scrum framework.
* Presenting solutions in the form of walk\-throughs to analysts, project managers, architects, development teams, developers, and testers to ensure understanding and assist delivery teams with story estimations and prioritization.
* Produce fit\-for\-purpose specifications documenting the solution.
* Produce data models, activity, component flow, functional decomposition and data flow diagrams using Enterprise Architect / Visio / Confluence.
* Document and implement, and guidelines to ensure that best solutions and designs are implemented and consistent with group architecture principals.
* Ensure that all stakeholders are engaged and kept up to date.
* Post implementation support to business and IT.
